content:
Infinite Jest / Derrida – Students must write an analytical response in a nonlinear, fragmented form.


✅ Why This Works:
• Tests every skill a student would use in regular coursework.
• Encourages students to take an “all-knowing” stance while proving their ability.
• Ties difficulty levels into literary theory and world-building.

🔄 2. Redemption Paths of Betrayal

📜 If a student fails a Mastery Exam, they must redeem themselves through a trial of retribution.
✔ Students only get one shot at redemption per failed exam.
✔ If they fail both the Mastery Exam and the Redemption Path, they are permanently removed from Mastery Streak eligibility.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 101 (chunk 101/555)
